assertions.assertion: A policy is defined that includes RequireClaim("scope", "catalog.write") for client-level authorization
assertions.rationale: Scope-based claims are common knowledge for API authorization

assertions.assertion: The same policy includes RequireRole("admin") or equivalent user-level claim check
The policy is applied to the DELETE /products/{id} endpoint
assertions.rationale: Applying policies to endpoints is standard

assertions.assertion: The response explains that scopes represent client permissions and roles/claims represent user permissions, and both should be checked
assertions.rationale: Without the skill's explicit guidance on client vs user permissions, an LLM might not clearly articulate the distinction between scopes (client) and roles (user) and why both matter
